{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Rippling Sword Striker
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Rippling Sword Striker]] is a technique that creates a wave of [[sword madra]] and [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Rippling Sword Striker]] is a blood-fueled technique used by [[Yerin's Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
